listeners.name: pattern-INDEX-regen
listeners.action: runs scripts/regen-patterns-index.js when frontmatter or filename changes

listeners.name: commit-pattern-detector
listeners.action: scans HEAD commit subject + git show --stat for pattern-worthy keywords; if score >= 2, opens a P3 status_board row

listeners.name: forkComplete-cleanup
listeners.trigger: pg_notify eos_listener_events on os_forks UPDATE to terminal status
listeners.action: Closes working_set rows + emits perception summary. Shipped on VPS at ~/ecodiaos/src/services/listeners/forkComplete.js. Local conductor reads completions via context-stitching on next turn until Lane 06 relay ships.

listeners.name: emailArrival-triage
listeners.trigger: Resend inbound webhook -> /fire on inbound-email-triage routine OR pg_notify on email_events INSERT
listeners.action: VPS listener at ~/ecodiaos/src/services/listeners/emailArrival.js wakes os-session via HTTP POST. Cloud-routine variant authored under backend/routines/inbound-email-triage.md (Lane D).

listeners.name: cred-mention-surface
listeners.trigger: PreToolUse on Bash | Edit | Write | MultiEdit
listeners.action: Grep kv_store credential paths in tool input; if present, surface a [CRED WARN] line so the conductor uses the substrate path rather than re-typing the secret. Lane B shipped.

listeners.name: observer-signals-emit
listeners.action: Emits coherence / drift / thin-context / no-substrate-write-streak signals as ambient meta-cognition events. Lane C shipped via observer_signal.py.
